Our New Classmates.name: Our New Classmates Video
Our New Classmates.overview: Students create short video interviews introducing their new classmates using present simple and comparatives.

Our New Classmates.name: My Previous School vs. My New School
Our New Classmates.overview: Students design a digital poster comparing their previous school with their current school.

Our New Classmates.name: Classroom News Bulletin
Our New Classmates.overview: Students create a classroom news bulletin reporting school events and routines.

Panama's Wildlife.name: Panama Wildlife Documentary
Panama's Wildlife.overview: Students create a documentary about animals and their habitats in Panama.

Panama's Wildlife.name: Animal Habitat Infographic
Panama's Wildlife.overview: Students design an infographic explaining the habitats and habits of wildlife.

Panama's Wildlife.name: Wildlife Awareness Campaign
Panama's Wildlife.overview: Students develop a campaign promoting wildlife protection.

Legends of Panama.name: Panamanian Legends Podcast
Legends of Panama.overview: Students produce a podcast narrating and discussing local legends.

Legends of Panama.name: Illustrated Legends Book
Legends of Panama.overview: Students create an illustrated book of Panamanian legends.

Legends of Panama.name: Legends Theater Performance
Legends of Panama.overview: Students perform dramatizations of famous legends.

The Importance of Water.name: Water Conservation Campaign
The Importance of Water.overview: Students design posters promoting responsible water use.

The Importance of Water.name: Water Usage Survey
The Importance of Water.overview: Students collect and analyze water use data at home or school.

The Importance of Water.name: Clean Water Awareness Video
The Importance of Water.overview: Students produce a video explaining why clean water is essential.

The Town Square.name: Town Map Project
The Town Square.overview: Students design a map of a town square with landmarks.

The Town Square.name: Traditional vs Modern Buildings
The Town Square.overview: Students compare building materials used in architecture.

The Town Square.name: Community Tour Guide
The Town Square.overview: Students create a guide describing the town's important places.

Arts and Crafts.name: Local Artists Exhibition
Arts and Crafts.overview: Students organize an exhibition presenting local artists.

Arts and Crafts.name: Traditional Crafts Workshop
Arts and Crafts.overview: Students demonstrate how traditional crafts are made.

Arts and Crafts.name: Art Gallery Presentation
Arts and Crafts.overview: Students create a virtual gallery presenting artworks.

The Healing Plants of Panama.name: Healing Plants Guide
The Healing Plants of Panama.overview: Students create a guide describing medicinal plants.

The Healing Plants of Panama.name: Traditional Medicine Interview
The Healing Plants of Panama.overview: Students interview community members about healing plants.

The Healing Plants of Panama.name: Natural Remedies Presentation
The Healing Plants of Panama.overview: Students present the benefits of natural plants.

Famous Panamanians.name: Biography Presentation
Famous Panamanians.overview: Students research and present biographies of famous Panamanians.

Famous Panamanians.name: Panamanian Heroes Poster
Famous Panamanians.overview: Students design posters celebrating famous citizens.

Famous Panamanians.name: Hall of Fame Exhibition
Famous Panamanians.overview: Students create a class exhibition about Panamanian achievers.
